name: Merchants Nearby
title_tag: Manage Your Business Information on Merchantsnearby with Synup
detailed_paragraph:
Merchants Nearby + Synup

Add, claim, edit business listings & reviews on Merchants Nearby with Synup's listings & review management tools.

What is Merchants Nearby?

Merchants Nearby, an innovative platform for discovering local businesses and services in your vicinity, simplifies the process of finding what you need. Whether you're searching for nearby shops, restaurants, or service providers, Merchants Nearby offers convenient tools to connect you with local offerings.

Why Merchants Nearby + Synup?

  • Complete Control Over Listings: With the ability to manage your business listings on Merchants Nearby, you maintain full control over your online presence, ensuring your business is represented accurately.
  • Broaden Your Reach: Adding your business to Merchants Nearby through Synup means increased visibility. Help potential customers discover you, effectively expanding your reach.
  • Accurate Business Information: Enhance trust and credibility by publishing accurate information on Merchants Nearby.
  • Customer Engagement: View and respond back to reviews on Merchants Nearby, fostering a positive relationship with your customers, showing that you value their feedback and are attentive to their needs.

How to integrate Merchants Nearby + Synup?

The Merchants Nearby integration is available to all Synup listings plan subscribers. To view & manage the Merchants Nearby integration:

  1. Visit the Listings tab on Synup's console.
  2. Navigate to the Premium Listings section.
  3. Click on the Merchants Nearby logo to manage the Synup + Merchants Nearby integration and associated settings.
